name: Cherry Nut Bars
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large mixing bowl, combine flour, quick oats, sugar, chopped pecans, baking soda, and butter.
2. Mix at low speed until crumbly.
3. Reserve 1 1/2 cups of the mixture for topping. Press the remaining mixture into the bottom of a 9 x 13 x 2 inch baking pan.
4. Bake at 350°F for 12-15 minutes.
5. Spread cherry pie filling evenly over the crust.
6. Sprinkle marshmallows and remaining crumbs over top.
7. Return to oven and bake an additional 25 to 35 minutes, or until the topping is golden brown.
8. Cut into bars when cool.
